summary: A captured Fox News broadcast interview with Border Czar Tom Homan (anchor + remote guest split-screen) about getting DMV data from blue states and English-proficiency requirements for truck drivers, with dashcam and crash-scene B-roll. It is a re-posted cable-news interview, not produced or music-driven youth-appeal content.
notable_text: TOM HOMAN | BORDER CZAR; BLUE STATES PUT ILLEGALS BEHIND THE WHEEL; AMERICANS DYING IN ILLEGAL-TRUCKER CRASHES
